authorization_note: Standing authorization established 2026-07-22 when the owner directed landing of the bringup governance v4 baseline (adapted per the same-day evaluation). Scope: volatile and ram_rw tiers only. ram_rw claims additionally require the record-level persistent-media acknowledgment because on lmi the rootfs lives on userdata and a RAM-booted OS can write it. The persistent tier is intentionally NOT a standing scope: every partition write requires a matching authorized_profiles entry (per-profile, hash-bound owner authorization). The forbidden set is hardcoded in scripts/bringup_loop.py and cannot be widened from this file.
